fields.title: Remove remaining .beads assumptions from footer, docs, and bundled skills
fields.description: Clean up tau repo surfaces that still assume Beads storage, vocabulary, or workflow outside the core planning tool implementation.
fields.design: Update footer hygiene, README, AGENTS.md, and tau-bundled skills to describe backlog event storage, auto-import behavior, and current commands. Footer should read replayed or materialized backlog state rather than raw .beads files.
fields.acceptance_criteria: Footer in-progress counts come from backlog state. README and AGENTS quick-reference commands use backlog terminology. Tau-bundled skills no longer define Beads as the task source of truth. Migration and storage behavior are documented for shared-repo use.
